title: 11 Herbal Creams For Dry Lips
description: Melissa officinalis creams contains tannins, flavonoids, and terpenes as its active constituents. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help soothe and protect dry, chapped lips. Tannins help reduce inflammation and irritation, while flavonoids promote skin health and elasticity. Terpenes, particularly limonene and linalool, have antibacterial properties that prevent infection and promote wound healing. By using Melissa officinalis creams, dry, cracked ...
